name: Chicken Kona (Crockpot)
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Chicken - in large pieces or quarters (3 to 4)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle chicken with salt and pepper.
2. Place chicken in the Crockpot.
3. Combine onion, soy sauce, wine, and water in a bowl.
4. Pour the mixture over the chicken.
5. Cover and cook on Low for 3-4 hours or until the chicken is tender.
6. Remove chicken from the pot and arrange on a broiler pan.
7. Brush honey over the chicken.
8. Broil until golden brown, brushing with honey several times.
Chicken and sauce may be refrigerated and browned at a later time if desired.
